channel.title: itch.io Charity Bundles — Opportunities
channel.description: Auto-collected posts and jams related to charity/fundraisers on itch.io (fresh-only).

item.title: [JAMS] itch.io
item.description: Week Love Good Games 2nd Anniversary Jam Hosted by Funtime Interactive Â· #WeeksLoveGoodGamesAnniversary 3 Joined 0 Entries Overview Community Submissions open from 2026-03-14 09:00:00 to 2026-03-16 09:00:00 Submissions due in years months days hours minutes seconds Join jam ð®
